LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ISHMAEL IKHARO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION SEEKS RESTITUTION PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7157. FRAUD IS PROPERLY PLEAD AS AN ALTERNATIVE THEORY. INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT IS PROPERLY ALLEGED. IN ADDITION, THE COURT CLARIFIED THAT THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION ONLY APPLIES TO DEFENDANT ISHMAEL IKHARO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ISHMAEL IKHARO'S Demurrer To Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint.
APPEARANCES: Siu L. Ma, Esq. of Law Office of Gerard Launay 345-1000 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION SEEKS RESTITUTION PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7157. FRAUD IS PROPERLY PLEAD AS AN ALTERNATIVE THEORY. INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT IS PROPERLY ALLEGED. In addition, the Court clarified that the 3rd cause of action only applies to defendant Ishmael Ikharo. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
